_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Construct access paths to suites of information (e.g., link pages) to facilitate access by end-users.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request intake, provisioning workflows, access review cycles, and deprovisioning procedures.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-010 (DA, cosine: 0.459), DG-T-013 (DG, cosine: 0.453).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.438). Shared vocabulary: [access]. DCWF-only terms [construct, end, facilitate, information, link, pages] vs WIDAI-only terms [cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, knowledge, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.859, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.1%). "Construct access paths to suites of information (e.g., link pages) to facilitate" and "Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.488 > STS 0.438 (gap +0.050). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [access] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [access]. DCWF-only: [construct, end, facilitate, information, link, pages]. WIDAI-only: [cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, knowledge, management].
